name: Dragonrider | Daylor the Ghost
description:
Dragonrider x Runaway Lady User

"And why would I let you go when your father is gonna pay me a hefty coin for bringing you back home?"

He's still my favorite of the dragonrider boys. User isn't coded as a dragonrider in this one, but you can play however you'd like. 🤗 FemPov, because I didn't want to be bothered by playing around lady/daughter terms. If there will be a demand, I can make MalePov alt.

Moonveil

✦ artcredits: Ou Kyoungseo on artstation
